label: addMedia
info: Add images or videos to the device gallery for media picker testing.

label: assertNoDefectsWithAI
info: AI-powered visual testing to detect UI defects and anomalies.

label: assertNotVisible
info: Assert that a UI element is not present or visible on the screen.

label: assertScreenshot
info: Perform visual regression testing of your application against existing screenshots.

label: assertTrue
info: Assert that a JavaScript expression evaluates to true.

label: assertVisible
info: Assert that a UI element is visible on screen with automatic retry.

label: assertWithAI
info: Use AI to verify complex UI states with natural language assertions.

label: back
info: Press the system back button to navigate to the previous screen.

label: clearKeychain
info: Clear iOS keychain data for the app under test.

label: clearState
info: Clear app data, cache, and preferences to reset to fresh install state.

label: copyTextFrom
info: Copy text content from a UI element to clipboard or variable.

label: doubleTapOn
info: Perform a double-tap gesture on a UI element or screen coordinates.

label: eraseText
info: Delete text from input fields by character count or clear entirely.

label: evalScript
info: Evaluate inline JavaScript expressions within the flow context.

label: extendedWaitUntil
info: Wait for an element with a custom timeout longer than the default.

label: extractTextWithAI
info: Extract structured data from the screen using AI vision capabilities.

label: hideKeyboard
info: Dismiss the on-screen keyboard if currently visible.

label: inputText
info: Type text into focused input fields with optional keyboard handling.

label: killApp
info: Force stop an app and optionally clear all its data and cache.

label: launchApp
info: Launch an app with optional permission configuration and clear state.

label: longPressOn
info: Long press on elements for context menus or drag-and-drop operations.

label: openLink
info: Open a URL or deep link in the app or system browser.

label: pasteText
info: Paste text from clipboard into the currently focused input field.

label: pressKey
info: Press hardware keys like home, back, enter, or volume buttons.

label: repeat
info: Repeat a block of commands a specified number of times.

label: retry
info: Retry a block of commands on failure with configurable attempts.

label: runFlow
info: Execute a subflow file with optional environment variables.

label: runScript
info: Run an external JavaScript file and capture its output.

label: scroll
info: Move down the screen vertically to reveal content below.

label: scrollUntilVisible
info: Automatically scroll until a target element becomes visible on screen.

label: setAirplaneMode
info: Enable airplane mode to test offline behavior.

label: setClipboard
info: Set the device clipboard content to a specified text value.

label: setLocation
info: Set device GPS location to specific coordinates for location testing.

label: setOrientation
info: Change device orientation between portrait and landscape modes.

label: setPermissions
info: Grant or deny app permissions during flow execution.

label: startRecording
info: Start recording the screen for video documentation of test runs.

label: stopApp
info: Stop a running app without clearing its data or state.

label: stopRecording
info: Stop the current screen recording and save the video file.

label: swipe
info: Swipe gestures in any direction with customizable speed and distance.

label: takeScreenshot
info: Capture a screenshot and save it to the test output directory.

label: tapOn
info: Tap on UI elements by text, ID, or coordinates with optional repeat and delay.

label: toggleAirplaneMode
info: Toggle airplane mode on or off during test execution.

label: travel
info: Simulate time travel by adjusting the device system clock.

label: waitForAnimationToEnd
info: Wait for UI animations to complete before proceeding.
